data.description: Planisware released a declaration on its share transactions from April 13-15, 2026. Key data included.

data.title: Launched From Submarines, Trusted by 30 Navies: REMUS Marks 25 Years Beneath the Surface
data.description: In National Harbor, Md., on April 20, 2026, HII (NYSE: HII) commemorated the 25th anniversary of the REMUS unmanned underwater vehicle (UUV) line at the 2026 Navy League Sea-Air-Space Exposition. This milestone highlights 25 years of progress, dependability, and operational flexibility that have positioned REMUS as the premier autonomous underwater vehicle series globally.

data.title: Genova Diagnostics Names Keith Meadors Chief Commercial Officer to Support Next Phase of Growth
data.description: Keith Meadors, MBA, MT(ASCP), has been named Chief Commercial Officer of Genova Diagnostics in Asheville, N.C. The appointment comes on April 20, 2026, signifying a significant stride for the pioneering advanced diagnostic testing company. Meadors' strategic role arrives amidst Genova's ongoing growth initiatives, demonstrating the company's commitment to expanding its market presence and enhancing commercial operations.

data.title: Hata Completes US$8 Million Series A Financing Led by Bybit
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on April 20, 2026, Hata, the sole dual-licensed digital asset exchange in the country, revealed the completion of a Series A funding round amounting to USD 8 million (around RM31.6 million). The funding was spearheaded by Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally.

data.title: NATIONAL GEOGRAPHIC-LINDBLAD EXPEDITIONS ANNOUNCES RECORD-BREAKING YEAR FOR TRAVELER-SUPPORTED GLOBAL IMPACT
data.description: Over $3 million has been dedicated to conservation, science, education, and storytelling through the Lindblad Expeditions-National Geographic Fund. This initiative, in partnership with the National Geographic Society, aims to support various projects in these areas. The investment was announced in New York on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Persona and ConnectID Deliver Privacy-First Age Verification for the Australian Market
data.description: A major infrastructure provider, Persona, revealed today its collaboration with ConnectID®, an Australian digital identity network, in San Francisco on April 20, 2026. This partnership aims to assist businesses in adhering to age-compliance laws. Through this integration, companies can better navigate these regulations and ensure compliance.

data.title: In HelloNation, Electrical Expert Joe Fussell of Midland Explains What to Know Before Installing a Car Charger at Home
data.description: In Midland, Texas on April 20, 2026, the question of whether one can set up a Level 2 car charger at their residence was explored. A recent article outlined that the feasibility of this installation hinges on factors such as the individual's electrical setup, the specific location of the property, and preparedness for ensuring safety. Electrical Specialist Joe Fussell from City Wide provided expertise on this matter.

data.title: WaterField Designs Introduces Versus Gaming Sling, a Dual-Compartment Sling for Two Handheld Gaming Devices
data.description: The Versus Gaming Sling, made in San Francisco, is carefully crafted to hold two handheld gaming devices. It has two compartments to keep a main console separate from a second device, accessories, or other items. This structured sling safeguards larger handhelds and allows easy access to essentials.

data.title: Leading Legal Innovation Expert Monica Zent Invited to Address U.S. Embassy Mauritius on AI Enablement
data.description: In Mauritius, a significant conference highlighted efforts to promote an inclusive AI-driven future. Monica Zent, a prominent figure in AI technology and Managing Director of Law Innovation Agency, participated as a key expert. The event took place on April 20, 2026, in Sunnyvale, California. Zent's expertise in AI legal applications and enterprise strategies contributed to the dialogue aimed at shaping the technological landscape.

data.title: AI Era Corp. (OTC: AERA) Completes Transformational Strategic Pivot — Emerges as a Leading Agentic AI Company in the Worldwide Entertainment Space With Dramatic Gains in Sales Growth, Operating Margin and Net Margin
data.description: AI Era Corp has successfully completed a strategic pivot, positioning itself as a top player in the global entertainment industry. As a result, the company has solidified its reputation as a prominent agentic AI company. This transformation marks a significant milestone for AI Era Corp, highlighting its shift towards a new direction in the market. This move is expected to significantly impact the company's growth and market presence in the entertainment sector.

data.title: Physician Partners of America's CEO Josh Helms Announces Fort Worth South Clinic is Relocating
data.description: A clinic specializing in interventional pain management in Fort Worth, Texas is making a move to a new location on Oakmont Boulevard. The Physician Partners of America's (PPOA) clinic, previously situated at 6900 Harris Parkway, will now be operating from the new site. This relocation marks a significant development for the clinic in Fort Worth, with the move taking place on April 20, 2026.

data.title: In HelloNation, Education Expert Kim Dunbar of Columbia, South Carolina, Explains What to Know Before Switching to Online School
data.description: In Columbia, South Carolina on April 20, 2026, a recent article from HelloNation featuring Education Expert Kim Dunbar of SC Whitmore School provides valuable advice for families considering the switch to online schooling. The piece outlines essential factors that students and parents should be aware of before making this transition.

data.title: XRP Bulls' Long-Term Target Is $8: Here's What's Needed To Make It Real
data.description: Bullish investors of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) are setting their sights on an $8 target following SBI Ripple Asia's announcement of securing regulatory approval to issue prepaid payment tokens on the XRP Ledger. This move is aimed at tapping into Japan's lucrative $200 billion prepaid market. SBI Ripple Asia, a joint venture based in Tokyo between Ripple and SBI Holdings, obtained registration as a third-party prepaid payment instrument issuer under Japan's Payment Services Act on March 26, with the platform going live in early April. The initiative involves converting prepaid balances into blockchain tokens on the XRP Ledger, with Japanese yen serving as the underlying asset. Additionally, Tobu Top Tours, a prominent travel division of Tobu Railway, is planning to release tourism payment tokens that travelers can utilize for various expenses like accommodations, transportation, and attractions. The prepaid payment instruments sector in Japan sees an annual volume of around 30 trillion yen, which equals roughly $200 billion. Notably, Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) recently revealed a $153.8 million stake in spot XRP ETFs in its Q4 2025 13F filings. For more details, access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Paratus Energy: Notice of 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: Bermuda-based company, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (PLSV), has disclosed the scheduling of its 2026 Annual General Meeting on May 12, 2026. The Notice of Annual General Meeting and related details will be accessible to shareholders.

data.title: Max Stock Limited releases an immediate report on holdings of interested parties and senior officers as of March 31, 2025
data.description: In accordance with regulations 33(c)-(d) of the Securities Regulations (Periodic and Immediate Reports) from 1970, Max Stock Limited, listed on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange under the ticker MAXO, disclosed the holdings of interested parties and senior officers as of March 31, 2026. The announcement includes detailed information about the Company's stakeholders and executive team, providing transparency in line with regulatory requirements.
